sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, text String)ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!');
UPDATE test_table SET text = replaceRegexpAll(text, 'World', 'Clickhouse') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(text, '[!]', '!!') AS modified_text FROM test_table;
SELECT id, replaceRegexpAll(text, '(Hello)', '\\1, SQL') AS updated_text FROM test_table;
